description:
Shoot the ransomware. Read the lesson. ⚡ Built in React with zero game engine. 💻 

Threats Defender is a cybersecurity arcade game built in React — shoot down viruses, ransomware, and phishing attacks before they breach your firewall. Every kill drops a one-sentence lesson so you absorb real security awareness between every shot.

No game engine. Just React, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

🎯 What you'll learn

- How to build a real-time game loop using requestAnimationFrame and refs (zero re-renders per frame)
- TypeScript types for every game entity: Threat, Beam, DataObject, GameState
- Weighted random spawning so rarer threats appear less often at low levels
- Axis-aligned bounding box (AABB) collision detection from scratch
- Four distinct movement patterns: straight, zigzag, wave, and dash
- Level scaling — speed and spawn rate ramp every 500 points
- Persisting the all-time best score to localStorage across sessions



▶️ Full breakdown: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nYIdf0vwpvI
